summary: Created from a 2026-07-18 captioning investigation. Wire comfy_workflows/raw/image_descriptor.json (already authored: Input_Image -> Scale 1MP -> Generate Text (qwen3vl_4b_fp8_scaled, temp 0.2) -> Output_prompt) into a DEV radial action that captions the current image into the prompt box. Goal = judge whether caption->upscale beats re-using the user's thin original prompt. Text-output capture ALREADY EXISTS as a general contract (MPI-242: commandExecutor.js:1347 title-scoped Output_prompt scan + comfyOutputUrls.js:51 readComfyOutputText + delivered via onComplete promptText at :1612). Model needs NO download - same Qwen3-VL 4B text encoder Krea2 already loads. BLOCKER verified in source: generationService.js:769 treats zero media URLs as a CANCELLED generation (emits tool:cancelled + generation:cancelled, ends activity, returns) and discards promptText read one line earlier at :767 - this is the first text-only op in the fleet. Needs an op-level 'returns text not media' declaration; a guard clause at the crash site would be a symptom patch. Rejected after evaluation: JoyCaption/llama.cpp (per-platform native binaries; full record in Cubric-Prompt MPI-12), Florence-2 (user production experience), MXFP8/NVFP4/GGUF/abliterated variants.
